windows.note: Codex hooks are currently disabled natively on Windows; use WSL2 or another supported POSIX layer for parity validation.

commands: d="$PWD"; while [ "$d" != "/" ] && [ ! -d "$d/.codex/hooks" ]; do d="$(dirname "$d")"; done; node "$d/.codex/hooks/session-init.cjs"
d="$PWD"; while [ "$d" != "/" ] && [ ! -d "$d/.codex/hooks" ]; do d="$(dirname "$d")"; done; node "$d/.codex/hooks/subagent-init.cjs"
notes: Codex does not currently expose this lifecycle event natively.

commands: d="$PWD"; while [ "$d" != "/" ] && [ ! -d "$d/.codex/hooks" ]; do d="$(dirname "$d")"; done; node "$d/.codex/hooks/context-reminder.cjs"
d="$PWD"; while [ "$d" != "/" ] && [ ! -d "$d/.codex/hooks" ]; do d="$(dirname "$d")"; done; node "$d/.codex/hooks/post-index-reminder.cjs"
notes: Codex currently only emits Bash for PostToolUse; this matcher cannot be expressed natively.

commands: d="$PWD"; while [ "$d" != "/" ] && [ ! -d "$d/.codex/hooks" ]; do d="$(dirname "$d")"; done; node "$d/.codex/hooks/scout-block.cjs"
d="$PWD"; while [ "$d" != "/" ] && [ ! -d "$d/.codex/hooks" ]; do d="$(dirname "$d")"; done; node "$d/.codex/hooks/privacy-block.cjs"
notes: Codex currently only emits Bash for PreToolUse; non-Bash tool interception requires compatibility runtime coverage.

commands: d="$PWD"; while [ "$d" != "/" ] && [ ! -d "$d/.codex/hooks" ]; do d="$(dirname "$d")"; done; node "$d/.codex/hooks/build-gate-hook.cjs"
d="$PWD"; while [ "$d" != "/" ] && [ ! -d "$d/.codex/hooks" ]; do d="$(dirname "$d")"; done; node "$d/.codex/hooks/subagent-stop-reminder.cjs"
notes: Codex does not currently expose this lifecycle event natively.

commands: d="$PWD"; while [ "$d" != "/" ] && [ ! -d "$d/.codex/hooks" ]; do d="$(dirname "$d")"; done; node "$d/.codex/hooks/session-metrics.cjs" 2>/dev/null || true
d="$PWD"; while [ "$d" != "/" ] && [ ! -d "$d/.codex/hooks" ]; do d="$(dirname "$d")"; done; node "$d/.codex/hooks/lesson-capture.cjs" 2>/dev/null || true
d="$PWD"; while [ "$d" != "/" ] && [ ! -d "$d/.codex/hooks" ]; do d="$(dirname "$d")"; done; node "$d/.codex/hooks/notifications/notify.cjs" 2>/dev/null || true

statusLine.note: Codex does not expose the Claude statusLine hook; keep this as compatibility runtime support.
